author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (USB foundation + KVM hot path):

- drivers/usb/core-enumerate.md: covers drivers/usb/core/{usb,hub,port,config}.c — USB enumeration + hub driver: hub-port state machine (DISCONNECTED → POWERED_OFF → POWERED_ON → CONNECTED → ENABLED → ADDRESSED → CONFIGURED → SUSPENDED), debounce 200ms, port reset (USB-2 vs USB-3 BH-reset), addressing (SetAddress retry up to GET_MAXPACKET_TRIES), GET_DEVICE_DESCRIPTOR first-8-then-full, GET_CONFIG_DESCRIPTOR chain parse, per-interface registration triggering per-class driver bind via usb_bus_type::probe, USB-3 LPM (U1/U2 negotiation), per-port BadUSB authorization gate. 10 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + state-transition + descriptor-OOB + addr-overflow) / Layer-2 ref to hub_state.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus hub_event semantic equivalence.
- virt/kvm/x86-mmu-tdp.md: covers arch/x86/kvm/mmu/tdp_mmu.c + tdp_iter.c + spte.c — TDP MMU EPT/NPT page-table walker (KVM x86 hot path): per-vCPU root selection per kvm_mmu_role, atomic-cmpxchg SPTE installation on guest page-fault, MMU-notifier integration (host pte change → SPTE invalidate), huge-page (2MB/1GB) auto-promote + auto-split, dirty-tracking (manual write-protect OR Intel PML mode), NX-Huge-Pages mitigation for iTLB-multihit CVE family, lockless walk for instruction emulator hot path. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (iter-OOB + SPTE-atomicity + root-UAF + pgtable-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to spte_lifecycle.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus install↔guest-walk equivalence.

Total state: 244 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 10 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set now: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-usb-core-enumerate, design-virt-kvm-x86-mmu-tdp.

Next iter plan: kernel/locking/qspinlock.md (qspinlock 4-queue MCS + slowpath — referenced by every spinlock usage) + drivers/gpu/drm/atomic.md (DRM atomic-modeset commit pipeline — every Wayland compositor depends).
